title: Deep Friendship Is Possible at This Age
subtitle: An affirmation for the woman who has concluded that real connection is behind her
excerpt: A short affirmation for staying open to deep friendship in mid-life. For the woman who has quietly decided that the kind of closeness she wants is something that only happens when you are young.

content.text: A short affirmation for staying open to connection. The belief that deep friendship is a young person's territory (that the window for being truly known by someone new is closed) is common and understandable given how mid-life friendships often play out. It is also not true. This affirmation keeps the window open.
Deep friendship is possible at this age. I am open to it. I am worth knowing.

Three sentences. The first is a factual claim about possibility. The second is an orientation, not a command: open, available, willing. The third is the piece most often missing from the friendship belief: the conviction that you are, in fact, someone worth the investment of getting to know.
